questionHtml: Structure IV contains a gland that secretes a sugary liquid. Suggest a benefit to the plant of secreting this liquid.
markschemeHtml:
1. attracts an insect/animal/which pollinates the flower;
  2. attracts a pollinator;

Mpa: Both parts of the sentence are needed to award the point.

meta.title: Structure IV contains a gland that secretes a sugary liquid. Suggest a benefit to the plant of secreting this liquid.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.1.9. Features of an insect-pollinated flower
